artPrompt: The kinetic instant a determined canvasser's fist hammers a suburban front door in extreme foreshortening, knuckles thrust toward the viewer, a clipboard tucked under one arm, breath held mid-rap. Sunlit picket fences and tidy front yards with blank lawn placards recede behind under golden afternoon light, leafy green shadows slashing across the porch, breathless civic energy, rendered as a bold painted graphic-novel splash — strong silhouettes, heavy directional inking and dramatic shadow shapes, fully painted (not flat cel comic).
name: Door-Knock Marathon
text:
Knock on the table a number of times, out loud, as fast as you can while holding your breath. For each knock before you run out of breath (max ten), create a 1/1 green and white Voter creature token.
(No fair pre-breathing. Petunia is watching. Petunia is always watching.)
flavorText: Block after block, knuckle after knuckle. Democracy is mostly cardio.
